shadows.name: sh-rest
shadows.purpose: Interactive hover lift — buttons, card hover

shadows.name: sh-glow
shadows.purpose: Hero accent glow — use very sparingly

motion.name: ease-back
motion.purpose: Micro-overshoot — logo pop-in, toast enter only

motion.name: ease-snappy
motion.purpose: Fast snappy spring — sidebar item active state

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Full-pill shape, terracotta fill. Used for submit actions and sign-in.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d08a59; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1); will-change: transform; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b87540; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.97); box-shadow: none; transition-duration: 0.08s; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d08a59; outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — magic link, cancel. Transparent background with subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #5a5652; padding: 11px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #e8eaed; border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.20); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d08a59; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Email, password, and other form fields. Elevated background at rest.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #161412; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14); border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.4; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1), box-shadow 0.18s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(208,138,89,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(208,138,89,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9e9792; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard container for content blocks. White surface on gray shell; border, no shadow at rest.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1); }

components.name: Tab Switcher
components.description: Sign in / Create account toggle. Pill tray with elevated background; active tab is terracotta.
components.css: .ds-tab-tray { display: flex; background: #e8eaed; border-radius: 12px; padding: 4px; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; padding: 10px; border-radius: 9px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #5a5652; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-tab.ds-tab-active { background: #d08a59; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(208,138,89,0.3); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d08a59; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Logo Mark
components.description: 36x36px terracotta pill. Three analytics bars + ascending arrow. Always terracotta — never any other fill.
components.css: .ds-logo { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; background: #d08a59; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
AskBiz looks like something a CFO would have on their desk if CFOs had good taste. Data-forward without being clinical; warm without being soft. The visual vocabulary is precise: clean tokens, sharp type, a single amber accent that carries all the brand warmth while the surface stays neutral and cool.

Every design decision serves one master: time-to-answer. Founders open this app with a specific question and need an answer in under 60 seconds. Anything that adds delay, hesitation, or cognitive weight is eliminated. The interface does not try to be beautiful; it tries to be right. The beauty is a side-effect of the precision.

The tone is that of a blunt, trusted analyst: never hedges, never over-explains, always gives you the number and the action. The visual system is the voice made visible — sharp edges, precise type, no decoration that doesn't earn its place.
keyCharacteristics: Cool blue-gray shell; white cards; terracotta (#d08a59) as the only accent
Sora (display) + DM Sans (body) — geometric precision meets humanist legibility
Spacing varies for rhythm — tight within groups, generous between sections
RTL support built in (Arabic is an active locale)

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: #d08a59 is the only brand color used on interactive elements. Never place a second accent (#6366f1, #8c6fe0) on a primary button or navigation active state. Indigo is for AI surfaces only.

rules.name: The Cool Shell Rule
rules.body: The page background (#f2f3f5) must remain cool. Do not warm it. The amber reads stronger against a cool field. A warm shell muddy the contrast and reads as cream — which is the generic 2026 AI tell.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor Rule
rules.body: Display and headline letter-spacing never exceeds -0.03em. Below that, letters touch and the page reads cramped. -0.02em to -0.03em is the working range.

rules.name: The Sora-for-Identity Rule
rules.body: Sora appears on headings and the wordmark only. Body copy, form labels, and navigation always use DM Sans. Mixing them at comparable weights destroys the hierarchy.

rules.name: The One-or-the-Other Rule
rules.body: A surface element either has a border OR a shadow — never both. The ghost-card pattern (border + wide box-shadow on the same element) is prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards at rest are flat (border only). Shadow appears as a response to state (hover, drag, elevation), never as decoration.

dos: Do use #d08a59 as the single brand accent on all CTAs, active states, and the logo mark
Do keep the background #f2f3f5 — cool, not warm
Do use Sora exclusively for headlines and the wordmark; DM Sans everywhere else
Do use tonal layering (shell → surface) as the primary depth cue; border on resting cards, shadow only on floating elements
Do use the spring easing (cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)) for state transitions
Do use font-size 16px minimum on mobile inputs to prevent iOS zoom
Do reserve #6366f1 (indigo) for the AI / Ask conversational feature only
Do test all text against WCAG AA (≥ 4.5:1)
Do provide a :focus-visible ring — 2px solid #d08a59 — on all interactive elements
donts: Don't use the warm-cream background band (#f9f7f2, #faf8f4, etc.) as a page shell — this is the 2026 AI monoculture tell
Don't use a border AND a shadow on the same card — the ghost-card pattern is prohibited
Don't exceed border-radius: 16px on cards — over-rounding reads as generic SaaS
Don't use indigo (#6366f1) on primary buttons, tab switchers, or navigation
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — use a single solid color
Don't put a side-stripe border (border-left: 3px solid #d08a59) on list items or cards
Don't use border-radius values 24/28/32/40px on cards — codex over-rounding tell
Don't place gray text (--tx3) on the amber accent background — use white
Don't use navy-blue-white enterprise SaaS color schemes (Salesforce/HubSpot energy — prohibited)
Don't use bouncy/elastic easing on main UI transitions — spring or decel only
